final:
module EchoCancellation(  
    input wire clk,  
    input wire rst,  
    input wire [15:0] input_signal,  
    input wire [15:0] reference_signal,  
    output reg [15:0] output_signal  
);  
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt) begin  
        if (rst) begin  
            output_signal <= 16'b0;  
        end else begin  
            output_signal <= input_signal - reference_signal;  
        end  
    end  
endmodule
